frontmatter.title: Higher Inductive Types and Internal Parametricity for Cubical Type Theory
frontmatter.meta: @phdthesis{cavallo:2021, author = {Cavallo, Evan}, school = {Carnegie Mellon University}, year = {2021}, number = {CMU-CS-21-100}, title = {Higher Inductive Types and Internal Parametricity for Cubical Type Theory}, }
